nasb.text: After these things Jesus manifested Himself again to the disciples at the Sea of Tiberias, and He manifested Himself in this way.

esv.text: After this Jesus revealed himself again to the disciples by the Sea of Tiberias, and he revealed himself in this way.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，耶穌在提比里亞海邊再次向門徒顯現。他顯現的經過是這樣的：

ccb.text: 后来，耶稣在提比哩亚海边又向门徒显现。当时的情形是这样：

csbs.text: 这些事以后，耶稣在太巴列湖边又向门徒们显明了自己。他是这样显明自己的：
